summary: Match score 14.3% — poor match. This is a skilled trades project manager role for water and fire damage restoration, requiring vocational craft training and construction/damage assessment expertise. The candidate has an academic business background in corporate PMO and technology operations — a complete mismatch in domain and qualification type. Application is not recommended.
